query: SELECT id, scientific_name, trade_name, price, pharmacological_action, black_box_warning, uses, pregnancy_category, standard_dose, adjusted_dose, neonatal_dose, dose_source, contraindicated_interactions, major_interactions, moderate_interactions, minor_interactions, createdAt, updatedAt FROM drug_lens WHERE (scientific_name, trade_name) IN (SELECT scientific_name, trade_name FROM drug_lens GROUP BY scientific_name, trade_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY scientific_name, trade_name, id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT id, scientific_name, trade_name, price, pharmacological_action, black_box_warning, uses, pregnancy_category, standard_dose, adjusted_dose, neonatal_dose, dose_source, contraindicated_interactions, major_interactions, moderate_interactions, minor_interactions, createdAt, updatedAt FROM drug_lens WHERE (scientific_name, trade_name) IN (SELECT scientific_name, trade_name FROM drug_lens GROUP BY scientific_name, trade_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY scientific_name, trade_name, id
messages: 1037	BUDESONIDE	CORTRIEF 64 mcg Nasal Spray Suspension	45	Inhaled/topical corticosteroid;
binds glucocorticoid receptors suppressing airway/mucosal inflammation.		✅ APPROVED
Asthma (inhaled); COPD (inhaled, combination); allergic rhinitis; Crohn's disease (oral, ileal/right colonic); microscopic colitis; eosinophilic oesophagitis.	B	👤 ADULT:
Inhaled: 200–800mcg/day in divided doses. Nasal: 64–256mcg/day. Oral (Crohn's): 9mg OD.
👶 PEDIATRIC:
100–400mcg/day inhaled.	🫘 RENAL:
no specific adjustment.
🟫 HEPATIC:

Severe: systemic exposure increases, monitor for cortisol suppression.	Neonatal dosing not established or not indicated. Consult NeoFax (Merative), BNF for Children neonatal section, or clinical pharmacist before use.	· BNF
· FDA PI

· GINA Guidelines (2023)		▪ CYP3A4 inhibitors e.g. ritonavir, itraconazole, ketoconazole (increased systemic budesonide, Cushing's syndrome risk)	▪ Other corticosteroids (additive HPA axis suppression)
▪ Antidiabetics (corticosteroids increase blood glucose)	▪ Strong CYP3A4 inducers (reduced budesonide efficacy)	2026-03-22 04:47:47	2026-03-28 00:20:36

6435	RECOMBINANT RESPIRATORY SYNCYTIAL VIRUS PREFUSION F PROTEIN ADJUVANTED WITH AS01E	AREXVY 120 mcg Powder+Suspension Injection	925.65	RSV subunit vaccine;
stabilized prefusion F protein + AS01E adjuvant for RSV prevention in older adults.		✅ APPROVED

Adult Immunization; Respiratory Syncytial Virus - Vaccination.	C	RSV vaccine (Arexvy/Abrysvo): Adults ≥60yr: 0.5mL IM single dose. Maternal (28–36 weeks gestation): 0.5mL IM single dose.	Specific renal/hepatic dose adjustment data not available. Use clinical judgment and refer to prescribing information.	Neonatal dosing not established or not indicated. Consult NeoFax (Merative), BNF for Children neonatal section, or clinical pharmacist before use.	· BNF (British National Formulary)
